title.en: SYSTEMS FOR CONTROLLING OR REGULATING NON-ELECTRIC VARIABLES
Control of position, course, altitude or attitude of land, water, air or space vehicles, e.g. using automatic pilots (drive control systems specially adapted for autonomous road vehicles B60W60/00)
{with arrangements to save energy}
{associated with a remote control arrangement}
{with safety arrangements}
{to help an aircraft pilot in the rolling phase}
{characterized by the autonomous decision making process, e.g. artificial intelligence, predefined behaviours (using knowledge based models G06N5/00)}
{involving pointing a payload, e.g. camera, weapon, sensor, towards a fixed or moving target}

using feedback

Specific applications of the controlled vehicles
for soil shifting, building, civil engineering or mining, e.g. excavators
for cleaning, vacuuming or polishing

{for collecting waste or trash}

for transportation

for combat

for manufacturing, maintenance or repairing

for sport or gaming activities
for shows or performances

for information gathering, e.g. for academic research

Land vehicles
Aircraft, e.g. drones
Water vehicles
Space vehicles
Vehicles specially adapted for two or more of space, air, land or water environments, e.g. amphibious vehicles
